examples: The new building does not harmonize with its surroundings.
All of the instruments have different sounds, and the parts they play blend and harmonize with one another.
Amid these scenes of savage brilliancy there dwells a race whose qualities seem to harmonize with their environment.
He recently set off an uproar by proposing that the European Union "harmonize" taxes, i.e.
The intent is to harmonize the regulation of the sector, ensuring that companies receive uniform treatment.
